issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnPlay' not 'Activated' — this is a static/passive ability that grants a keyword, not an activated ability requiring player action
Duration should be 'Permanent' not 'EndOfTurn' — this ability grants a constant keyword that lasts the character's lifetime, not just one turn
Second effect (PlaySelf on Trigger/Always) is spurious and should be removed — card text contains no play instruction

Keyword 'Unblockable' is incorrect — the ability allows attacking active Characters (normally blockable), so use 'DirectAttack' or similar. 'Unblockable' would mean cannot be blocked at all, which is different from attacking active chars
